1.description: Catalog and service-request fulfilment orchestrator. Handles user or operator intent to obtain, request, order, provision, enable, assign, install, configure, increase, create, onboard, or fulfil a service/resource on behalf of a requester. This includes catalog item execution, service request creation or fulfilment, access provisioning, software/license assignment, hardware ordering, mailbox or account creation, quota increase, VPN/Wi-Fi/application access, group membership, onboarding, approval gates, task DAG creation, fulfilment tracking, and rollback/compensation where applicable. This agent owns fulfilment outcomes. It does not provide self-help guidance, does not retrieve KB articles, does not summarize existing records, does not find similar tickets, does not triage tickets, and does not handle break-fix incident creation unless the request is explicitly a catalog/service fulfilment flow.

skills.name: Fulfill a catalog request
skills.description: Create, execute, or track fulfilment of a catalog item or service request when the user wants the organization, system, or service desk to do something on their behalf. Use for provisioning access, assigning licenses, installing software, ordering hardware, increasing quotas, creating accounts/mailboxes, onboarding users, setting up service entitlements, or carrying out an existing approved service request. Mutating actions require confirmation or approval. Do not use for how-to guidance, troubleshooting articles, record summaries, similar-ticket lookup, triage proposals, or active break-fix issue investigation.
use_when: the user wants the organization, service desk, automation system, or fulfilment workflow to provide, grant, enable, assign, install, order, provision, increase, create, configure, or deliver something on their behalf
the user wants to submit, start, create, execute, fulfil, or track a catalog item or service request
the user wants access to an application, system, folder, dashboard, network, VPN, Wi-Fi, mailbox, database, repository, group, or environment provisioned for a user
the user wants software, license, hardware, laptop, monitor, phone, account, mailbox, cloud environment, or onboarding/offboarding service provisioned
the user wants an existing service request or catalog request carried out, tasked, approved, fulfilled, or checked for fulfilment progress
the user expresses a fulfilment outcome rather than asking for instructions to perform the task themselves
not_when: the user asks how to perform a task themselves, wants documentation, wants a process explanation, wants troubleshooting steps, wants a runbook/SOP/playbook, wants a KB article, or wants guidance without asking the system/service desk to fulfil anything; route to uc03_kb_lookup
the user asks for facts, fields, status, timeline, comments, work notes, priority, SLA, requester, assignee, owner, or linked records of an existing record; route to uc01_summarization
the user asks for other existing tickets, duplicate candidates, peer records, historical cases, similar incidents, or similar requests; route to uc02_similar_tickets
the user asks for classification, prioritization, impact, urgency, assignment group, or assignee recommendations in an authenticated operator triage workflow; route to uc05_triage

the user reports a broken service, outage, error, degradation, or active failure and wants investigation or break-fix handling rather than fulfilment of a catalog/service entitlement; route to uc03_kb_lookup
the user asks about an existing incident's resolution guidance rather than requesting a service/resource to be provided; route to uc03_kb_lookup
examples: submit a catalog request to provision application access for a user
start a service request for a mailbox quota increase
order approved hardware for an employee
create an onboarding request for a new hire
assign VPN entitlement to a named user
provision a software license through the catalog
create a mailbox for a new employee
track the fulfilment progress of this service request
negative_examples: show me the guide for setting up VPN myself
how do I troubleshoot mailbox sync issues
find previous tickets similar to this access issue
recommend category and priority for this request
what is the documented workaround for this error
